channel.title: The Clearing — AI Fatigue Resources for Engineers
channel.description: A curated library of guides, tools, and research for software engineers experiencing AI fatigue. Built by engineers, for engineers.

item.title: Forward to a Colleague
item.description: Forward The Dispatch to a colleague who's drowning in AI fatigue. Pre-written email template included. Join 2,000+ engineers who've found their way back.

item.title: AI Fatigue Recovery Checklist
item.description: A 30-day recovery checklist for AI-fatigued engineers: 30 evidence-based daily actions across four themed weeks. Printable, no account needed.

item.title: The AI Weekly Audit
item.description: Track your actual AI tool usage for one week. See patterns, identify overload, and get personalized insights. No account needed. Free.

item.description: You took the quiz. You read the signs. Now what? A practical guide for engineers who suspect they have AI fatigue — first steps, recovery paths, and what...

item.title: RTO + AI Fatigue: The Double Pressure on Engineers
item.description: RTO mandates meet AI tool overwhelm. Here's how engineers are being crushed by return-to-office policies while also being pushed to adopt AI tools.

item.title: Best of The Dispatch
item.description: The 10 most-read issues from The Dispatch, our weekly newsletter for engineers experiencing AI fatigue. Data, stories, and tactics that actually help.

item.title: The AI Decision Stack: Framework for Engineering Teams
item.description: The AI Decision Stack helps engineering teams evaluate AI tools across 4 dimensions: cognitive cost, skill preservation, team dynamics, and sustainability.

item.title: Knowledge Debt: Understanding Less While Your Codebase Grows
item.description: You ship code you can't explain. You maintain systems you didn't design. That's knowledge debt — and it's quietly making your team fragile.

item.title: Vibe Coding Rules: A Practical Guide for Engineering Teams
item.description: The unspoken rules of vibe coding — when to use it, when to avoid it, and how teams can set AI coding norms without killing momentum.

item.title: The 24-Month AI Projection for Engineers
item.description: Software engineers worst-case 24-month AI fatigue trajectory. Compounding skill loss, identity erosion, and what the exit ramps look like at each stage.

item.description: 10 engineers shared their AI fatigue recovery stories. Submit yours or nominate a colleague. Real stories from the frontlines of AI fatigue.

item.title: AI Fatigue at Big Tech: The Hidden Engineer Crisis
item.description: Inside the exhaustion at the world's largest tech companies. Google, Meta, and Amazon engineers share what's burning them out — and why AI is making it worse.

item.title: The Estimation Problem: Why AI Makes Guessing Harder
item.description: AI tools make you ship faster but ruin your ability to estimate. Here's why that matters — and how to get your calibration back.

item.title: Career Pivot Guide for AI-Fatigued Engineers
item.description: Thinking about leaving software engineering due to AI fatigue? A practical guide to career pivots — when to go, how to prepare, and where engineers...

item.title: The Middleman Problem: Engineers Feel Like Strangers to Code
item.description: 71% of engineers feel like middlemen between AI tools and their own code. It's not imposter syndrome. It's the middleman problem — and it's fixable.

item.title: How to Talk About AI Fatigue at Work: Scripts for Engineers
item.description: You know something's wrong but you can't name it. Here's how to have the AI fatigue conversation with your manager, team, and yourself.

item.description: Enterprise leaders: here's how to build an AI wellness program that actually works for engineers. Structured initiatives, ROI data, and implementation roadmap.

item.title: On-Call AI Fatigue: When AI Creates More Incidents
item.description: On-call engineering is harder with AI-generated incidents. Learn why AI tools are creating new kinds of alert fatigue and how to recover.

item.title: Underrepresented Engineers & AI Fatigue: A Growing Problem
item.description: Women, people of color, and LGBTQ+ engineers face unique AI fatigue pressures. Here's what's different, why it compounds, and what actually helps.

item.description: Welcome to The Dispatch — the weekly letter for engineers navigating AI fatigue. Your first issue arrives Sunday.

item.description: You're here because you get it. Clearing-ai.com helps engineers recover from AI fatigue. Here's how to help others find us.

item.description: One page. Everything you need to start recovering from AI fatigue today. Print it. Stick it on your monitor. Share it with your team.

item.description: Know an engineer who's drowning in AI tools? Share The Clearing — free resources, no signup required.

item.description: A no-AI block means one hour — sometimes just 30 minutes — where you write code without AI assistance. Here is why it works, how to start small, and what to...

item.description: Before accepting any AI suggestion, write one sentence on why it works. The Explanation Requirement: the single practice that rebuilds skills and ownership.

item.description: Nominate a colleague or share your own AI fatigue recovery story. Every story helps other engineers feel less alone. Anonymous. Free. Reviewed in 48 hours.

item.description: Software engineering has a mental health crisis. This guide covers burnout, anxiety, depression, and the unique pressures engineers face — with real...

item.title: AI Brownout: The Quiet Exhaustion After the AI Honeymoon
item.description: AI Brownout is the slow, chronic exhaustion that sets in after the novelty of AI coding tools wears off. Learn the signs, why it happens, and how to recover.

item.title: AI Skeptic Engineer: When Everyone's Excited But You're Not
item.description: Feeling skeptical about AI tools while your team is all-in? You're not broken. Here's why being an AI skeptic in 2026 might mean you're paying attention.

item.description: 3,000+ engineers took our quiz. 71% said the same thing. Take the 2-min AI Fatigue Quiz and get your recovery plan.

item.description: 3,000+ engineers took The Clearing AI Fatigue Quiz. 71% feel like middlemen, 58% saw skills decline. Here is what the data reveals.

item.description: Senior engineers face a unique AI fatigue crisis: identity loss, skill atrophy, authorship questions, and mentoring teams through the AI transition.

item.description: Practical guide for engineering managers to recognize, prevent, and address team AI fatigue. Signs to watch, 1:1 questions, and team norm frameworks.

item.description: You're subscribed to The Dispatch. Your first issue is on its way. Explore recovery guides, the quiz, tools, and community while you wait.

item.description: Startups create unique AI fatigue: velocity worship, role blur, AI mandates. Signs, founder scripts, and recovery strategies.

item.description: The craft of software engineering is worth protecting. An opinionated manifesto for engineers who want to use AI tools without losing what makes them good.

item.title: Inference Fatigue: When AI Reasoning Costs You Think
item.description: Every AI tool has a hidden cost: the reasoning tax your brain pays when you evaluate, verify, and correct AI output. Here's the real toll.
